entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND CLEARINGS
entities.description: The process of clearing land for agricultural purposes, which is increasing in the study area

entities.description: The specific geographical region in Burkina Faso where the study was conducted

entities.name: ECONOMETRIC MODELING
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the socio-economic factors of land clearings

entities.name: THEORY OF LAND RENT
entities.description: The theoretical framework upon which the econometric modeling is based

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SURVEYS
entities.description: The data collection method used to gather information from 538 households

entities.name: BOULON FOREST
entities.description: One of the forests bordering the sampled households in the study area

entities.name: KOFLANDÉ FOREST
entities.description: One of the forests bordering the sampled households in the study area

entities.name: FARM NET INCOME PER HECTARE
entities.description: A socio-economic indicator whose decrease is associated with increased land clearings

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A crop whose growth is associated with agricultural land clearings

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop whose growth is associated with agricultural land clearings

entities.name: MARITAL STATUS
entities.description: A socio-economic characteristic of the household head associated with land clearings

entities.name: POVERTY STATUS
entities.description: A socio-economic characteristic of the household head associated with land clearings

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: A proposed strategy to reduce the rate of agricultural land clearings

entities.name: WESTERN REGION OF BURKINA FASO
entities.description: The broader region where agricultural intensification is suggested as an option
